action_type.description: (Optional) Semantic label for significant protocol events. Routine anchoring by any terminal omits this field. Actor/Claimant: use SESSION_START at session initiation only to declare the active Norm Profile; omit for all other anchors. Referee: MUST include the appropriate value for each protocol action — the Keeper reacts mechanically to these values (ASSESSMENT_ISSUED triggers escrow release and increments assessment_count; POH_CERT_ISSUED is the Proof of Human Involvement equivalent and increments poh_cert_count, kept separate from assessment_count so PoHI volume does not pollute incident-assessment reputation metrics; all Referee values update statistics). Referee action_type anchors MUST be sent to the Referee's own Keeper only. For operational notifications to parties' Keepers (Kc, Ka), use INCIDENT_NOTICE instead.

cert_id.description: (Optional) The cert_id of the CONTRIBUTION_RESULT or POH_CERTIFICATE associated with this anchor. Present when action_type == ASSESSMENT_ISSUED or action_type == POH_CERT_ISSUED. Used by the Referee's own Keeper for archival reference and license reconciliation.

norm_profile_id.description: Reverse-domain notation ID of a supported Norm profile (e.g., rackp.standard.v1, jp.go.mlit.automotive.v1).

norm_fetch_url.description: URL from which this Norm profile is retrieved. The Keeper MUST record this URL in association with the terminal_id and norm_profile_id.

norm_profiles.description: Required when action_type == SESSION_START. Declares all Norm profiles this terminal supports. At least one entry is required. The Keeper records each norm_profile_id and norm_fetch_url in association with this terminal_id.

incident_id.description: (Optional) The ID of the corresponding incident. Used together with action_type.
